filesystem.c(3) Library Functions Manual filesystem.c(3)

NAME

filesystem.c - File operation stubs for WASM.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


FILE * platform_fopen (const char *name, const char *filename, const char *mode)
Safe file open stream (fopen replacement). FILE * platform_tmpfile (void)
Create a temporary file (tmpfile replacement). asciichat_error_t platform_mkdir_recursive (const char *path, int mode)
Create directories recursively (mkdir -p equivalent). asciichat_error_t platform_find_config_file (const char *filename, config_file_list_t *list_out)
Find config file across multiple standard locations. void config_file_list_destroy (config_file_list_t *list)
Free config file list resources. ssize_t platform_write (int fd, const void *buf, size_t count)
Platform-safe write function. ssize_t platform_read (int fd, void *buf, size_t count)
Safe file read (read replacement). int platform_open (const char *name, const char *pathname, int flags,...)
Safe file open (open replacement). int platform_close (int fd)
Safe file close (close replacement). int platform_access (const char *pathname, int mode)
Check file/directory access permissions. char * platform_get_data_dir (void)
Get the application data directory.

Detailed Description

File operation stubs for WASM.

Definition in file wasm/stubs/filesystem.c.
